title: Nursery Rhyme. DIV. Natural History.
content:
Burnie bee, burnie bee,
        Tell me when your wedding be?
        If it be to-morrow day,
        Take your wings and fly away.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DIV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
